A evolução não é linear, é iterativa. E: Evolution isn't linear, it's iterative. And it's forged under pressure.
Meu nome é Jônatas, moro em Extrema-MG,: My name is Jônatas, I live in Extrema-MG (Brazil), and I have a peculiar background. My career started outside of tech, at McDonald's. It might sound odd for a technical interview, but that's where I learned absolute resilience and execution under extreme pressure – what I usually call my 'unofficial SRE training'.
Migrei pesado para o desenvolvimento atr: I migrated heavily into development through my IT technician course at SENAC, consolidating the foundations of web engineering. I scaled rapidly as a freelancer delivering End-to-End apps, from Web Panels to Apps consuming Stripe and Supabase (like the Cafeteria Damore ecosystem and JYNSGE News).
O Salto para Arquitetura e Liderança: The Leap to Architecture and Leadership
O grande salto foi assumir como Tech Lea: The big leap was stepping up as Tech Lead and Architect at LUMEN, a GovTech. There, I didn't just write code; I architected the Lumen Platform, a SaaS B2G Enterprise for public tenders. While most used traditional frameworks, I deployed Laravel Octane and Swoole to break critical speed bottlenecks. Simultaneously, I developed from scratch an autonomous AI engine consuming the OpenAI API via granular JSON Schemas, reducing weeks of bureaucratic work to under 5 minutes.
Além da parte arquitetural, atuei na lin: Beyond architecture, I operated on the frontlines resolving technical debt (Refactoring). When legacy systems crashed due to Race Conditions or transactional bottlenecks, I accessed Linux matrices via SSH and restored n8n automations or fixed RxJS-oriented logic in the frontend. My focus is mastering critical corporate environments, because that's where I demonstrate real control.
Hoje, curso Bacharelado em Engenharia da: Today, I'm pursuing a Bachelor's in Computer Engineering at UNIVESP to bulletproof my low-level foundation immutably. I remain focused on orchestrating modern ecosystems using PHP/Laravel, React, and AI as the core. My ultimate goal is to scale global-level projects delivering extreme performance, clean code, and fault resilience.
